description: Creates a legal hold on recovery points (backups). A legal hold prevents backups from being deleted while under hold.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the legal hold.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the legal hold.
